steps.title: Write each population
steps.content: Population equals area times population density. The town has population $1{,}040x$, and the suburb has population $540y$.

steps.title: Set the total
steps.content:
The combined population is $13{,}240$, so add the two population expressions:
$$1{,}040x+540y=13{,}240$$
The answer is A.
